name: skillet
description: A skillet full of agent skills: repo auditing, bug hunting, security sweeps, publish gates, releases, memory handoffs, and skill extraction

plugins.name: skillet
plugins.description: Production-tested skills for auditing, improving, and shipping repos with AI coding agents: line-check (repo audit + prioritized backlog), bug-hunt, security-sweep, expedite (drive an audit backlog to done), mise (idea to approved design and spec), recipe (spec to executable implementation plan), pressure-test, plate (scrub prose before it goes public), pass (PR-filing gate), publish-readiness, release-cut, memory-handoff, skillify
